mapper.select: SELECT E.user_id , E.company_id , C.company_name , E.employee_code , E.employee_name , E.no_use , E.employee_no , IFNULL(E.myself, 2) AS myself , E.birth , E.sex , E.email , E.mobile , E.zipcode , E.address1 , E.address2 , E.depart , E.title , EC.employee_checkup_id , EC.company_checkup_id , EC.vip , EC.support_type , EC.company_checkup_type_id , EC.special_checkup , EC.special_checkup_memo , EC.notes , EC.notok_guide , EC.notok_reserve , EC.notok_urge , EC.notok_updated_at , EC.notok_updated_user_id , (SELECT employee.employee_name FROM employee WHERE employee.myself = 1 AND employee.company_id = E.company_id AND employee.employee_code = E.employee_code) AS family_name FROM employee_checkup EC JOIN employee E ON EC.user_id = E.user_id JOIN company_checkup CC ON CC.company_checkup_id = EC.company_checkup_id JOIN company C ON CC.company_id = C.company_id WHERE EC.employee_checkup_id = #{employeeCheckup.employeeCheckupId}

SELECT CM.user_id , CM.company_id , EC.employee_checkup_id , EC.company_checkup_id , EC.support_type , EC.company_checkup_type_id , CCT.support_pay , CCT.copay , CCT.company_checkup_type_name FROM company_manager CM LEFT JOIN company_checkup CC ON CC.company_id = CM.company_id LEFT JOIN employee_checkup EC ON EC.company_checkup_id = CC.company_checkup_id LEFT JOIN company_checkup_type CCT ON CCT.company_checkup_type_id = EC.company_checkup_type_id WHERE CM.deleted_at IS NULL AND CC.deleted_at IS NULL AND EC.deleted_at IS NULL AND CCT.deleted_at IS NULL AND CM.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT EC.terms_of_use , EC.privacy_policy , EC.collection_and_use FROM employee E JOIN employee_checkup EC ON E.user_id = EC.user_id JOIN company_checkup CC ON EC.company_checkup_id = CC.company_checkup_id AND CC.checkup_year = #{checkupYear} WHERE E.user_id = #{sessionUserId}

SELECT E.user_id , E.employee_name , E.employee_no , E.myself , E.birth , E.sex , E.email , E.mobile , E.zipcode , E.address1 , E.address2 , C.company_name , EC.employee_checkup_id , EC.support_type , EC.company_checkup_type_id FROM employee E JOIN company C ON C.company_id = E.company_id JOIN employee_checkup EC ON E.user_id = EC.user_id WHERE C.deleted_at IS NULL AND E.deleted_at IS NULL AND E.user_id = #{userId} AND E.company_id = #{companyId} AND E.employee_code = #{employeeCode}

SELECT E.user_id, E.employee_name FROM employee E JOIN employee_checkup EC on E.user_id = EC.user_id WHERE E.deleted_at IS NULL AND E.myself IS NULL AND E.company_id = #{companyId} AND E.employee_code = #{employeeCode} ORDER BY E.myself DESC, EC.support_type, E.employee_name

SELECT COUNT(E.user_id) AS total_count FROM company JOIN employee E ON company.company_id = E.company_id AND E.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN employee_checkup EC ON E.user_id = EC.user_id AND EC.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN ( SELECT company_id , MAX(checkup_year) AS checkup_year FROM company_checkup WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY company_id ) LAST_CC ON company.company_id = LAST_CC.company_id JOIN company_checkup CC ON LAST_CC.company_id = CC.company_id AND LAST_CC.checkup_year = CC.checkup_year AND EC.company_checkup_id = CC.company_checkup_id WHERE company.company_id = #{companyId} AND EC.support_type = 0

SELECT COUNT(E.user_id) AS apply_count FROM company JOIN employee E ON company.company_id = E.company_id AND E.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN employee_checkup EC ON E.user_id = EC.user_id AND EC.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN reservation R ON EC.employee_checkup_id = R.employee_checkup_id AND R.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN ( SELECT company_id , MAX(checkup_year) AS checkup_year FROM company_checkup WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY company_id ) LAST_CC ON company.company_id = LAST_CC.company_id LEFT JOIN company_checkup CC ON LAST_CC.company_id = CC.company_id AND LAST_CC.checkup_year = CC.checkup_year AND EC.company_checkup_id = CC.company_checkup_id WHERE company.company_id = #{companyId} AND (R.reservation_state != 0 OR R.confirmed_at IS NULL) AND (R.reservation_state = 1 OR R.reservation_state = 2 OR R.reservation_state = 3 OR R.reservation_state = 5) AND EC.support_type = 0;

SELECT COUNT(E.user_id) AS checkup_count FROM company JOIN employee E ON company.company_id = E.company_id AND E.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN employee_checkup EC ON E.user_id = EC.user_id AND EC.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN reservation R ON EC.employee_checkup_id = R.employee_checkup_id AND R.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN ( SELECT company_id , MAX(checkup_year) AS checkup_year FROM company_checkup WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY company_id ) LAST_CC ON company.company_id = LAST_CC.company_id LEFT JOIN company_checkup CC ON LAST_CC.company_id = CC.company_id AND LAST_CC.checkup_year = CC.checkup_year AND EC.company_checkup_id = CC.company_checkup_id WHERE company.company_id = #{companyId} AND (R.reservation_state != 0 OR R.confirmed_at IS NULL) AND R.reservation_state = 4 AND EC.support_type = 0;

# EmployeeMapper.findID SELECT EC.employee_checkup_id FROM employee E JOIN employee_checkup EC ON E.user_id = EC.user_id JOIN company_checkup CC ON EC.company_checkup_id = CC.company_checkup_id AND CC.checkup_year = #{checkupYear} WHERE E.employee_name = #{employeeNameCrypt} AND E.mobile = #{mobile} AND E.myself = 1 AND E.no_use = 0 AND E.deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 0, 1
